[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a game-like “LEVEL UP!” interface screen with a profile circle on the left and level progress details in the center and right.

Main Subject:
A central dashboard-style panel displays the header “LEVEL UP!” at the top, with a larger name “Kayz Assisten” in the middle and a small badge reading “#1” next to it. A purple-outlined circular avatar appears on the left, showing a person in dark clothing and a hat-like head covering standing indoors near shelves or items. In the main panel, there are two prominent rounded rectangles showing “LEVEL 3” and “EXPERIENCE 15 / 200,” along with a horizontal progress bar and additional small stat blocks.

Setting:
The scene is a digital interface on a dark background with a purple and blue color scheme. No physical environment is shown beyond the small circular avatar photo, which appears indoors and well-lit.

Visual Details:
The overall background is dark purple with a gradient. The main panel is a rounded rectangle with a subtle border and faint glow. The “LEVEL UP!” text is in bright yellow at the top center, flanked by small diamond-like icons. The avatar circle on the left has a thick purple border; the avatar image inside shows a dark outfit and a tall, hat-like or head covering shape, with a second figure or accessory partially visible at the edge of the circle. The “LEVEL 3” box has a dark purple background with white text. The “EXPERIENCE 15 / 200” box has a dark teal background with white text and a fraction-style display. A thick horizontal progress bar stretches across the middle area, with a filled portion in purple/rose and a remainder in darker gray; “7%” appears at the right end. Three smaller rounded boxes below read “MESSAGES 25,” “XP NEEDED 185,” and “NEXT LVL 4,” each in different muted dark backgrounds with white/yellow highlights.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
Kayz Assisten
#1
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL 3
EXPERIENCE
15 / 200
7%

4
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
This image displays a “level up” game interface showing a level and experience progress for “Kayz Assisten.” It includes a profile avatar preview and additional counters for messages, XP needed, next level, and overall percentage progress.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
